discussion_points.summary: Reviewed the two-year cash reserve and the plan for distributions beginning in 2028.
US equity has drifted above its policy band; discussed reviewing a rebalance.

recommendations.summary: Discussed shifting the muni allocation toward a laddered investment-grade approach.

action_items.description: Route the muni allocation idea for a suitability / Reg BI review before any recommendation is confirmed.
Confirm the 2028 distribution start date and expected annual amount.

client_communication.subject: Summary of our July 14 review and proposed next steps
key_points: Thank you for the review; here is a summary of what we discussed.
We reviewed your cash reserve and the timing of retirement distributions.
We noted that US equity has moved above its policy band and proposed reviewing a rebalance for your consideration.
One idea we discussed is subject to an internal review before it becomes a formal recommendation; we will follow up.

next_meeting.purpose: Semi-annual review: confirm distribution plan and revisit allocation bands.
